nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 3am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 60 overnight. South southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after noon. Mostly cloudy. High near 83, with temperatures falling to around 79 in the afternoon. South southeast wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 56 overnight. South wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 11am and noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 77. Northwest wind around 8 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 49. West wind 6 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.
